creator: freebsd@mosedal.net
text:
Hi,
Apparently, I hit the submit button too soon - if this comment can be made the bug description, I'd be most happy about it.
This bug report contains a patch to fix a few Makefile issues discovered while I test upgraded the security/cyrus-sasl2 port from 2.1.26 to the latest RC7 candidate of Cyrus SASL 2.1.27.
It mainly ensures that the earlier values set in the USES and cyrus_configure_args are not overridden and lost.
Thank you,

Peter.
P.S.: If you want me to submit the updated port to 2.1.27-RC7, please let me know and I'll do that in a separate bug report.
